A '''power hammer''' was a [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] bludgeoning weapon originally used for heavy mining, and utilized [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor]] and [[Shockwave generator rod|shockwave generators]] within its [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] head to allow a miner to strike with incredible force. This was a popular feature among miners, as it allowed a user to smash through rocks and dense metal veins with ease. They also became popular melee weapons early in the history of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], when mining companies found themselves in possession of the Empire and the miners fought back with what was on hand; even heavily armored opponents could find themselves flying across a room when confronted with this weapon, their armor shattered, making it well suited for combat.
